steps.title: Trace the route shift
steps.content: The first sentence says modern via ferratas are rarely designed simply to reach summits. The next sentence says new routes favor recreation, challenge, and scenery. The transition should show what is now typical, not introduce a contradiction or a separate added point.

steps.title: Reject mismatched transitions
steps.content: Choices A and B signal contrast, but the ideas are explanatory rather than opposed. Choice C merely adds another point, while the sentence is clarifying the modern pattern. The remaining transition names what happens more commonly now. The answer is D.
